message:
test(perf+persistence): add extension stratification schema validation, PGO fallback integration tests, and E2E fault injection suite

bench_schema: Registers pi.perf.extension_benchmark_stratification.v1
schema and adds validate_extension_stratification_record() which
enforces the full structure: required top-level fields (schema, run_id,
correlation_id, layers, claim_integrity, lineage), mandatory layer_ids
(cold_load_init, per_call_dispatch_micro, full_e2e_long_session), and
per-layer structure including absolute_metrics, relative_metrics with
rust_vs_node and rust_vs_bun ratios, scenario_tags, lineage chain, and
claim_integrity guards. Adds orchestrate.sh toolchain stub
(install_fake_orchestrate_toolchain) that produces synthetic JSONL
fixtures matching all three suite outputs.

perf_bench_harness: Adds three PGO fallback integration tests exercising
the bench_extension_workloads.sh script with mock cargo/hyperfine stubs:
- pgo_use_mode_missing_profile_falls_back_with_explicit_reason
- pgo_use_mode_corrupt_profile_falls_back_with_explicit_reason
- pgo_use_mode_missing_profile_fails_when_fallback_disabled
Each test validates the JSONL pipeline events contain correct
profile_data_state, pgo_mode_effective, and fallback_reason fields.

qa_docs_policy_validation: Adds write_stub_command() and
pgo_events_from_dir() helpers, plus
run_bench_extension_workloads_with_stubs() integration harness that
invokes the real bench script with fake cargo/hyperfine/llvm-profdata
binaries and various PGO configurations.

fault_injection_persistence (new): Comprehensive E2E fault injection
persistence test suite (bd-3ar8v.2.10) covering multi-phase
append→crash→recover→continue→verify cycles, checkpoint boundary races,
stale temp file cleanup after interrupted atomic rewrites, autosave
queue state machine under fault injection, V2 store segment/index
consistency, cross-durability-mode fault behavior, and trace log
correlation for debugging persistence failures.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
